name: Elementalism
description: You exert control over the elements, channelling one of the following effects within range: Beckon Air (gust that moves an object weighing up to 10 lb, snuffs a flame, or briefly stirs the air for 1 hour); Beckon Earth (a 5-foot-square patch of ground becomes difficult terrain for 1 hour); Beckon Fire (instantaneously light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire); Beckon Water (condense moisture to fill a 1-foot Cube with mist for 1 hour). Whichever effect you choose, the spell creates only a minor elemental change with no combat-relevant force.
